title: toisusu urbaniana
side_effects: Toisusu urbaniana can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches. In severe cases, overuse of the plant's extracts can lead to respiratory issues, allergic reactions, and even temporary memory loss. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also cause skin irritation, including redness, itching, and rashes. Furthermore, improper preparation and consumption of the plant can lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting in some individuals.
